nasb.text: while You extend Your hand to heal, and signs and wonders take place through the name of Your holy servant Jesus.”

esv.text: while you stretch out your hand to heal, and signs and wonders are performed through the name of your holy servant Jesus.”

cnv.text: 求你伸手醫治，藉著你聖僕耶穌的名，大行神蹟奇事。”

ccb.text: 求你伸出手医治疾病，借着你圣子耶稣的名行神迹奇事。”

csbs.text: 求你伸出你的手，藉着你圣仆耶稣的名，使疾病痊愈，施行神迹和奇事。”
